sqlMap.select: select * from SecuritiesSuppLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.insert: insert into SecuritiesSuppLW(VersionSequence, PolicyKey FeesDerFromApplSecurityFiscalYr1 FeesDerFromApplSecurityFiscalYr2 IsNoConflictWithSecurityMatters IsAppSeekSecAdvRelToTransaction AppSeekSecAdvRelToTransactionDesc IsAppReqAttorneyToIntervClientDir IsAppReqRecordsOfFactualsource IsAppProhibitPolicyFromSecProcess AppProhibitPolicyFromSecProcessDesc IsAppProhibitSecAttorWithInvest IsAppProhibitFirmFromTrading IsAppReqSecToDissolveAllInvest IsAppHavePolicyGovernTrading IsAppPreventAttorneysStaff IsAppPrecludingInDisclosureDocs IsAppProhibitAttorneyOfDirector IsAppProhSecPaysForAppServices AppProhSecPaysForAppServicesDesc IsAppHaveObligationToPayServices IsAppReqAtleastOneSecurityAtt IsAppPolicyReqExecutiveCommRev IsAppSubjectOfInvestBySEC IsAppProvLegalServiceFor1933Act IsSecurityIssuedByBank IsSecurityIssuedByUS IsSecurityIssuedByLoanInstitute IsAppProvLegalServiceForInsuranceBonds IsAppProvLegalserviceForPrivPlaceBonds IsDiligenceRetForAllPrivateBonds NumberOfBondsIssuedToApp NumberOfBondsForGenObligation NumberOfBondsByRevenue NumberOfBondsOtherDetails ApplicantEmployForBondIssues BondCounsel Issuer Underwriter ApplicantEmployForBondIssuesOther NumberOfBondHaveExpInDefProc NumberOfBondCurrentInDef LastUpdateUserID LastUpdateTimeStamp ) values (#VersionSequence:NUMERIC#, #PolicyKey:NUMERIC# #FeesDerFromApplSecurityFiscalYr1# #FeesDerFromApplSecurityFiscalYr2# #IsNoConflictWithSecurityMatters# #IsAppSeekSecAdvRelToTransaction# #AppSeekSecAdvRelToTransactionDesc# #IsAppReqAttorneyToIntervClientDir# #IsAppReqRecordsOfFactualsource# #IsAppProhibitPolicyFromSecProcess# #AppProhibitPolicyFromSecProcessDesc# #IsAppProhibitSecAttorWithInvest# #IsAppProhibitFirmFromTrading# #IsAppReqSecToDissolveAllInvest# #IsAppHavePolicyGovernTrading# #IsAppPreventAttorneysStaff# #IsAppPrecludingInDisclosureDocs# #IsAppProhibitAttorneyOfDirector# #IsAppProhSecPaysForAppServices# #AppProhSecPaysForAppServicesDesc# #IsAppHaveObligationToPayServices# #IsAppReqAtleastOneSecurityAtt# #IsAppPolicyReqExecutiveCommRev# #IsAppSubjectOfInvestBySEC# #IsAppProvLegalServiceFor1933Act# #IsSecurityIssuedByBank# #IsSecurityIssuedByUS# #IsSecurityIssuedByLoanInstitute# #IsAppProvLegalServiceForInsuranceBonds# #IsAppProvLegalserviceForPrivPlaceBonds# #IsDiligenceRetForAllPrivateBonds# #NumberOfBondsIssuedToApp# #NumberOfBondsForGenObligation# #NumberOfBondsByRevenue# #NumberOfBondsOtherDetails# #ApplicantEmployForBondIssues# #BondCounsel# #Issuer# #Underwriter# #ApplicantEmployForBondIssuesOther# #NumberOfBondHaveExpInDefProc# #NumberOfBondCurrentInDef# #LastUpdateUserID# #LastUpdateTimeStamp# )
sqlMap.select: select FeesDerFromApplSecurityFiscalYr1, FeesDerFromApplSecurityFiscalYr2, IsNoConflictWithSecurityMatters, IsAppSeekSecAdvRelToTransaction, AppSeekSecAdvRelToTransactionDesc, IsAppReqAttorneyToIntervClientDir, IsAppReqRecordsOfFactualsource, IsAppProhibitPolicyFromSecProcess, AppProhibitPolicyFromSecProcessDesc, IsAppProhibitSecAttorWithInvest, IsAppProhibitFirmFromTrading, IsAppReqSecToDissolveAllInvest, IsAppHavePolicyGovernTrading, IsAppPreventAttorneysStaff, IsAppPrecludingInDisclosureDocs, IsAppProhibitAttorneyOfDirector, IsAppProhSecPaysForAppServices, AppProhSecPaysForAppServicesDesc, IsAppHaveObligationToPayServices, IsAppReqAtleastOneSecurityAtt, IsAppPolicyReqExecutiveCommRev, IsAppSubjectOfInvestBySEC, IsAppProvLegalServiceFor1933Act, IsSecurityIssuedByBank, IsSecurityIssuedByUS, IsSecurityIssuedByLoanInstitute, IsAppProvLegalServiceForInsuranceBonds, IsAppProvLegalserviceForPrivPlaceBonds, IsDiligenceRetForAllPrivateBonds, NumberOfBondsIssuedToApp, NumberOfBondsForGenObligation, NumberOfBondsByRevenue, NumberOfBondsOtherDetails, ApplicantEmployForBondIssues, BondCounsel, Issuer, Underwriter, ApplicantEmployForBondIssuesOther, NumberOfBondHaveExpInDefProc, NumberOfBondCurrentInDef, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from SecuritiesSuppLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update:
update SecuritiesSuppLW set
FeesDerFromApplSecurityFiscalYr1 = #FeesDerFromApplSecurityFiscalYr1# FeesDerFromApplSecurityFiscalYr1 = null FeesDerFromApplSecurityFiscalYr2 = #FeesDerFromApplSecurityFiscalYr2# FeesDerFromApplSecurityFiscalYr2 = null IsNoConflictWithSecurityMatters = #IsNoConflictWithSecurityMatters# IsNoConflictWithSecurityMatters = null IsAppSeekSecAdvRelToTransaction = #IsAppSeekSecAdvRelToTransaction# IsAppSeekSecAdvRelToTransaction = null AppSeekSecAdvRelToTransactionDesc = #AppSeekSecAdvRelToTransactionDesc# AppSeekSecAdvRelToTransactionDesc = null IsAppReqAttorneyToIntervClientDir = #IsAppReqAttorneyToIntervClientDir# IsAppReqAttorneyToIntervClientDir = null IsAppReqRecordsOfFactualsource = #IsAppReqRecordsOfFactualsource# IsAppReqRecordsOfFactualsource = null IsAppProhibitPolicyFromSecProcess = #IsAppProhibitPolicyFromSecProcess# IsAppProhibitPolicyFromSecProcess = null AppProhibitPolicyFromSecProcessDesc = #AppProhibitPolicyFromSecProcessDesc# AppProhibitPolicyFromSecProcessDesc = null IsAppProhibitSecAttorWithInvest = #IsAppProhibitSecAttorWithInvest# IsAppProhibitSecAttorWithInvest = null IsAppProhibitFirmFromTrading = #IsAppProhibitFirmFromTrading# IsAppProhibitFirmFromTrading = null IsAppReqSecToDissolveAllInvest = #IsAppReqSecToDissolveAllInvest# IsAppReqSecToDissolveAllInvest = null IsAppHavePolicyGovernTrading = #IsAppHavePolicyGovernTrading# IsAppHavePolicyGovernTrading = null IsAppPreventAttorneysStaff = #IsAppPreventAttorneysStaff# IsAppPreventAttorneysStaff = null IsAppPrecludingInDisclosureDocs = #IsAppPrecludingInDisclosureDocs# IsAppPrecludingInDisclosureDocs = null IsAppProhibitAttorneyOfDirector = #IsAppProhibitAttorneyOfDirector# IsAppProhibitAttorneyOfDirector = null IsAppProhSecPaysForAppServices = #IsAppProhSecPaysForAppServices# IsAppProhSecPaysForAppServices = null AppProhSecPaysForAppServicesDesc = #AppProhSecPaysForAppServicesDesc# AppProhSecPaysForAppServicesDesc = null IsAppHaveObligationToPayServices = #IsAppHaveObligationToPayServices# IsAppHaveObligationToPayServices = null IsAppReqAtleastOneSecurityAtt = #IsAppReqAtleastOneSecurityAtt# IsAppReqAtleastOneSecurityAtt = null IsAppPolicyReqExecutiveCommRev = #IsAppPolicyReqExecutiveCommRev# IsAppPolicyReqExecutiveCommRev = null IsAppSubjectOfInvestBySEC = #IsAppSubjectOfInvestBySEC# IsAppSubjectOfInvestBySEC = null IsAppProvLegalServiceFor1933Act = #IsAppProvLegalServiceFor1933Act# IsAppProvLegalServiceFor1933Act = null IsSecurityIssuedByBank = #IsSecurityIssuedByBank# IsSecurityIssuedByBank = null IsSecurityIssuedByUS = #IsSecurityIssuedByUS# IsSecurityIssuedByUS = null IsSecurityIssuedByLoanInstitute = #IsSecurityIssuedByLoanInstitute# IsSecurityIssuedByLoanInstitute = null IsAppProvLegalServiceForInsuranceBonds = #IsAppProvLegalServiceForInsuranceBonds# IsAppProvLegalServiceForInsuranceBonds = null IsAppProvLegalserviceForPrivPlaceBonds = #IsAppProvLegalserviceForPrivPlaceBonds# IsAppProvLegalserviceForPrivPlaceBonds = null IsDiligenceRetForAllPrivateBonds = #IsDiligenceRetForAllPrivateBonds# IsDiligenceRetForAllPrivateBonds = null NumberOfBondsIssuedToApp = #NumberOfBondsIssuedToApp# NumberOfBondsIssuedToApp = null NumberOfBondsForGenObligation = #NumberOfBondsForGenObligation# NumberOfBondsForGenObligation = null NumberOfBondsByRevenue = #NumberOfBondsByRevenue# NumberOfBondsByRevenue = null NumberOfBondsOtherDetails = #NumberOfBondsOtherDetails# NumberOfBondsOtherDetails = null ApplicantEmployForBondIssues = #ApplicantEmployForBondIssues# ApplicantEmployForBondIssues = null BondCounsel = #BondCounsel# BondCounsel = null Issuer = #Issuer# Issuer = null Underwriter = #Underwriter# Underwriter = null ApplicantEmployForBondIssuesOther = #ApplicantEmployForBondIssuesOther# ApplicantEmployForBondIssuesOther = null NumberOfBondHaveExpInDefProc = #NumberOfBondHaveExpInDefProc# NumberOfBondHaveExpInDefProc = null NumberOfBondCurrentInDef = #NumberOfBondCurrentInDef# NumberOfBondCurrentInDef = null LastUpdateUserID = #LastUpdateUserID# LastUpdateUserID = null LastUpdateTimeStamp = #LastUpdateTimeStamp# LastUpdateTimeStamp = null
where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from SecuritiesSuppLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
delete from SecuritiesSuppLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select FeesDerFromApplSecurityFiscalYr1, FeesDerFromApplSecurityFiscalYr2, IsNoConflictWithSecurityMatters, IsAppSeekSecAdvRelToTransaction, AppSeekSecAdvRelToTransactionDesc, IsAppReqAttorneyToIntervClientDir, IsAppReqRecordsOfFactualsource, IsAppProhibitPolicyFromSecProcess, AppProhibitPolicyFromSecProcessDesc, IsAppProhibitSecAttorWithInvest, IsAppProhibitFirmFromTrading, IsAppReqSecToDissolveAllInvest, IsAppHavePolicyGovernTrading, IsAppPreventAttorneysStaff, IsAppPrecludingInDisclosureDocs, IsAppProhibitAttorneyOfDirector, IsAppProhSecPaysForAppServices, AppProhSecPaysForAppServicesDesc, IsAppHaveObligationToPayServices, IsAppReqAtleastOneSecurityAtt, IsAppPolicyReqExecutiveCommRev, IsAppSubjectOfInvestBySEC, IsAppProvLegalServiceFor1933Act, IsSecurityIssuedByBank, IsSecurityIssuedByUS, IsSecurityIssuedByLoanInstitute, IsAppProvLegalServiceForInsuranceBonds, IsAppProvLegalserviceForPrivPlaceBonds, IsDiligenceRetForAllPrivateBonds, NumberOfBondsIssuedToApp, NumberOfBondsForGenObligation, NumberOfBondsByRevenue, NumberOfBondsOtherDetails, ApplicantEmployForBondIssues, BondCounsel, Issuer, Underwriter, ApplicantEmployForBondIssuesOther, NumberOfBondHaveExpInDefProc, NumberOfBondCurrentInDef, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from SecuritiesSuppLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select VersionSequence, PolicyKey, FeesDerFromApplSecurityFiscalYr1, FeesDerFromApplSecurityFiscalYr2, IsNoConflictWithSecurityMatters, IsAppSeekSecAdvRelToTransaction, AppSeekSecAdvRelToTransactionDesc, IsAppReqAttorneyToIntervClientDir, IsAppReqRecordsOfFactualsource, IsAppProhibitPolicyFromSecProcess, AppProhibitPolicyFromSecProcessDesc, IsAppProhibitSecAttorWithInvest, IsAppProhibitFirmFromTrading, IsAppReqSecToDissolveAllInvest, IsAppHavePolicyGovernTrading, IsAppPreventAttorneysStaff, IsAppPrecludingInDisclosureDocs, IsAppProhibitAttorneyOfDirector, IsAppProhSecPaysForAppServices, AppProhSecPaysForAppServicesDesc, IsAppHaveObligationToPayServices, IsAppReqAtleastOneSecurityAtt, IsAppPolicyReqExecutiveCommRev, IsAppSubjectOfInvestBySEC, IsAppProvLegalServiceFor1933Act, IsSecurityIssuedByBank, IsSecurityIssuedByUS, IsSecurityIssuedByLoanInstitute, IsAppProvLegalServiceForInsuranceBonds, IsAppProvLegalserviceForPrivPlaceBonds, IsDiligenceRetForAllPrivateBonds, NumberOfBondsIssuedToApp, NumberOfBondsForGenObligation, NumberOfBondsByRevenue, NumberOfBondsOtherDetails, ApplicantEmployForBondIssues, BondCounsel, Issuer, Underwriter, ApplicantEmployForBondIssuesOther, NumberOfBondHaveExpInDefProc, NumberOfBondCurrentInDef, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp from SecuritiesSuppLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
